response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS and Docker — all core to the role — plus direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks like Vitest. His open-source contributions, architectural versatility, and proven track record in enterprise automation tools align strongly with the job’s requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Vitest matching primary stack perfectly
Proven AI-agent infrastructure work and experience with internal tooling automation
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills with Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK, and CI/CD practices
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin/Java in recent roles, though past experience exists
German language proficiency is only basic, which may impact collaboration in Berlin-based teams
Resume spans many technologies; potential risk of breadth over depth in some areas
